title: FP8 (W8A8 dynamic) vs AWQ-int4  (+ draft = production spec-decode)
subtitle: 2x R9700 TP=2, single-user, fp8 KV. no-spec 2026-05-27; spec-decode 2026-05-28
note: Bars: FP8 W8A8 and AWQ-int4 are no-spec single-user decode. '+ draft' is the best production spec-decode tok/s (target + draft + --speculative-attention-mode decode @ TP2); 0/N-A means no usable draft on this box (no published draft, draft OOMs the DeltaNet/dense KV, gemma has no DFlash hook, or VL spec is broken sgl#17935). FP8 weights are 2x int4: par decode + full 256K only for dense <=24B and A3B-MoE; FP8 loses single-user MoE/DeltaNet decode (int4 wins M=1) and costs max context above ~24B. gemma-4-26B-A4B is the lone fp8-WMMA decode win.
